body:
Also add stats - accepted friends per week, month, total. We need to make sure we will have separate stats folder with folder for each month and inside for each week, so we update only stats.lino files for total, current week, and current month. Each file in its corresponding folder.

And we should show these stats on top of the application window, once at least once friend accepted.

Also we need to store initial friends count.

So we are able to ensure we don't accept all friends recursively by taking 10% of them each time. Potential friends = total incomming friends requests * 10% - total accepted friends.

So we only accept potential friends for if 10% share of incoming requests is greater then previously total accepted friends. Meaning it always stable calculation at all timeframes.

And it is not possible to have more than 10000 friends, so we should use this 10% calculation at all times, but accept friends until we have enough places in 10000.

If people unsubscribe from us, we should also cancel outgoing friend requests (but only if we don't have enough places for incoming potential requests that are planned to be accepted), except the priority list, which should be always in outgoing requests.

Also we need to double check, that if we start bot locally we should stop server bot, and vice versa. So no two bots are running at the same time. Can be checked using $ --status both remotely and locally. By default we should use screen isolation both locally and remotely.

Also if we do actions like start and stop we should give additional visual confirmation as in app floating notifications on top of the viewport in the middle.

By default both should be stopped, so user can adjust all settings, like priority friends list, invitation message or messages, and congratulation messages. By default 10 versions of each, that are chosen at random before send.

These should be expandable sections, so by default no configuration is required to start the bot, the defa configuration should already be prefilled for user.

With priority friends list taken current outgoing friends request, so user don't loose any connections by default, but he should be able to clear the list using single click.
